name: paopao-codex-plugin
description: paopao: turn source documents into editable consulting-style PPTX decks.

interface.shortDescription: Create editable consulting-style PPTX decks from source documents.
interface.longDescription: paopao is a licensed workflow shell for creating polished, editable PowerPoint decks from PDFs, reports, papers, and reference materials. Core templates and workflow updates are delivered through Paopao's license service.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Paopao to turn this document into an editable PPTX deck.
